nasb.text: The sons of Israel did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, and forgot the Lord their God and served the Baals and the Asheroth.

esv.text: And the people of Israel did what was evil in the sight of the Lord. They forgot the Lord their God and served the Baals and the Asheroth.

cnv.text: 以色列人行了耶和華看為惡的事，忘記了耶和華他們的　神，去事奉眾巴力和亞舍拉。

ccb.text: 以色列人做耶和华视为恶的事，忘记他们的上帝耶和华，祭拜假神巴力和亚舍拉。
